/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared  -o marvin_sdk.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/marvin_sdk.dir/marvin_bind.cpp.o CMakeFiles/marvin_sdk.dir/src/ACB.cpp.o CMakeFiles/marvin_sdk.dir/src/CAxisSpPln.cpp.o CMakeFiles/marvin_sdk.dir/src/FXDG.cpp.o CMakeFiles/marvin_sdk.dir/src/FileOP.cpp.o CMakeFiles/marvin_sdk.dir/src/FilePortal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/marvin_sdk.dir/src/MarvinSDK.cpp.o CMakeFiles/marvin_sdk.dir/src/Parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/marvin_sdk.dir/src/PointSet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/marvin_sdk.dir/src/Robot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/marvin_sdk.dir/src/ShMem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/marvin_sdk.dir/src/TCPAgent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/marvin_sdk.dir/src/TCPFileClient.cpp.o  -lpthread -lrt
